title: Gnidiopsis insularis
taxonomy: Gnidiopsis insularis is classified within the family Gnidiaceae. It belongs to the order Santalales, a group of flowering plants known as sandalwood or quinine trees. The order Santalales is part of the larger clade of flowering plants known as angiosperms. Gnidiopsis insularis is native to Australia and is a type of shrub. The exact classification within Gnidiopsis insularis is still being researched and updated in the scientific community.
